title: SPA Yield Lab — Stablecoin Card
description: A comparable, auditable due-diligence record for one stablecoin SPA can hold or route yield through (USDC, USDT, DAI, sUSDe, USDS, RWA-backed units). Research-layer artifact; not runtime data; never read by the deterministic RiskPolicy or execution path. All market-cap/supply/depth numbers are placeholders requiring data verification until sourced with a last-verified date. Advisory scores/allocation recommendations never override RiskPolicy caps. See docs/13_stablecoin_card_system.md, docs/12 (Protocol Cards), docs/38 (stablecoin yield engine), docs/14 (advisory Risk Scoring v2). Formalizes due-diligence implicit in stablecoin-bearing adapters (spa_core/adapters) + dfb risk overlay.

score_0_100.description: Advisory sub-score in [0,100]. Advisory only (Risk Scoring v2, docs/14); never a hard gate. Cites the dfb overlay verdict. null until computed.

last_date.description: Last attestation date (ISO-8601 or 'TBD - requires data verification').

stablecoin_id.description: Stable unique id, e.g. STC-0001. Never reused.

issuer.description: Issuing entity / protocol, e.g. Circle, Ethena, Sky.

attestations.description: Attestation/audit records. Empty array = none found (state so explicitly).

redemption_mechanism.description: How a holder redeems to the underlying (direct issuer redemption, AMM only, queue, gated).

liquidity_profile.description: On-chain + CEX liquidity depth summary. TBD - requires data verification.

exchange_depth.description: Depth on major venues / DEX pools (for exit-by-size). TBD until sourced.

market_cap.description: Market cap (USD). TBD until sourced; cite source + last-verified date.

top_holder_concentration.description: Concentration of supply in top holders (run-risk proxy). TBD until sourced.

depeg_history.description: Past depeg events. Empty array = none known (state so explicitly).

blacklist_freeze_risk.description: Whether the issuer can freeze/blacklist holdings.

regulatory_risk.description: Legal / sanctions / securities surface for this unit.

chains.description: Chains the stablecoin is native / bridged on.

main_use_cases.description: Primary use cases (collateral, settlement, yield unit, LP pair).

key_dependencies.description: External things that must hold (oracle, bridge, perp funding leg for synthetics, RWA custodian).

risk_score.description: Advisory overall stablecoin risk (higher = riskier per docs/14). Advisory only; cites dfb overlay.

max_allocation_recommendation.description: Advisory ceiling (% of book) in this unit. Never exceeds/overrides RiskPolicy caps (docs/06 A.1). TBD until sourced.

monitoring_requirements.description: What must be monitored (peg, reserve attestation cadence, funding for synthetics, redemption queue).

emergency_exit_triggers.description: Conditions that force exiting the unit (depeg beyond threshold, reserve doubt, freeze/blacklist action, redemption halt, funding flip).
